remaining goes to fee)"},"testFeeBounds_ExactInput(uint256,uint8,bool)":{"details":"Tests feeAmount bounds based on Uniswap V3 fee mechanicsWhen swap completes: feeAmount = testFeeAccuracy(uint256,bool).details: This is a soft test - it verifies fee is approximately correct but doesn't count violationsThe actual fee uses FullMath.mulDivRoundingUp(amountIn, fee, 1e6 - fee) when swap completesBut when swap doesn't fully fill, fee = amountRemaining - amountIn (all remaining goes to fee)

testFeeBounds_ExactInput(uint256,uint8,b.details: Tests feeAmount bounds based on Uniswap V3 fee mechanicsWhen swap completes: feeAmount = FullMath.mulDivRoundingUp(actualAmountIn, fee, 1e6 - fee)When swap hits limit: feeAmount = amountRemaining - actualAmountIn (all remaining goes to fee)

testMonotonicity_FeeTiers(uint256,bool).details: Lower fee should give more output for same input

testMonotonicity_LiquidityLevels(uint256.details: Higher liquidity should give same or better output (less slippage)

testReversibility_ExactOutputThenInput(u.details: Records reversibility data for invariant checking

resetState().notice: Reset the handler state for a new test run

setPoolState(int24,uint128,uint8).notice: Set pool state with bounded parameters

testFeeAccuracy(uint256,bool).notice: Test fee calculation accuracy across different amounts

testFeeBounds_ExactInput(uint256,uint8,b.notice: Record fee data for invariant checking

testMonotonicity_ExactInput(uint256,uint.notice: Test that larger input yields larger or equal output
